title: ICIIP -2013
content: 2013 IEEE Second International Conference on Image Information Processing (ICIIP -2013) December 9 - 11, 2013 Jaypee University of Information Technology Waknaghat, Shimla, Himachal Pradesh, INDIA The proceedings will be published by the IEEE and they will be included in IEEE Xplore IEEE Conference Record number: 31034 IEEE Catalogue number: CFP1369N-PRT ; ISBN: 978-1-4673-6099-9 ( Print Version) IEEE Catalogue number: CFP1369N-CDR ; ISBN: 978-1-4673-6100-2 (CD-ROM Version) IEEE Catalogue number: CFP1369N-ART ; ISBN: 978-1-4673-6101-9 (PDF Version) The Paper Submission is now CLOSED Statistics of ICIIP 2013 Received total submissions: 751 Accepted submissions: 146 Acceptance rate: 19.4% Indexed at IEEEXplore: 129 No. of TPC members: 389 (from 55 different countries) The 2013 IEEE Second International Conference on Image Information Processing - ICIIP 2013 is being organized by Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat near Shimla. The objective of the conference is to bring together researchers in the academic institutions and R&D Research Labs, working in the related fields and to use this as a forum to exchange views and ideas in these topics of current research. Original contributions are solicited for presentation at the 2013 IEEE Second International Conference on Image Information Processing (ICIIP - 2013) to be held at Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat www.juit.ac.in The topics of interest include (but are not limited to) the following : Technical Tracks : Image Processing Computer Graphics Computer Vision Pattern Recognition Image Security & Forensics Image Watermarking Image and Video Compression Image Restoration Image Forensics Image and Video Processing Architecture Image-Based Rendering Content-Based Image Retrieval Document Image Processing Bio-Medical Imaging Biometric Image Processing Computational and Statistical Methods Parallel Image Processing Motion and Video Analysis Sensors, Imaging model and Simulation Video Forensics Computer Graphics Data Mining Stereo Vision 3D Shape and Structure Analysis 3D Modeling and Visualization Pattern Analysis and Recognition Satellite Data Analysis and Interpretation Animation and Motion Robotics Robot Vision Wavelet Image Processing For more details, click here Important Dates Paper Submission CLOSED Acceptance Notification Deadline 10 September, 2013 Camera-Ready Manuscript Deadline 10 October, 2013 Conference Registration Deadline 15 October, 2013 Conference Dates 09 – 11 December , 2013 Organized by Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat, Shimla, Himachal Pradesh, INDIA www.juit.ac.in
